title: [BUG] Losing Pivot tables when loading a file
author: littlwoop
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

I have an excel-file with worksheets, some of which include pivot tables. After loading them and saving the workbook again it does not contain the Pivattables anymore. I tested it without changing anything and just loaded the file and saved it again, but with the same result. When opening it, an error promt tells me that there are problems with this excel file, and if I want to trust it anyway.
When opening the file the sheets with the pivottables contain only the values and lose all connections. 

Is this a bug or are pivot tables simply not supported in exceljs?

Lib version: 4.2.1

## Steps To Reproduce

These are the few lines of code to load and write the file:

        let templatePath = path.resolve(__dirname + '/Planung-und-Statistik-Bsp.xlsx');
        let workbook = new ExcelJS.Workbook();
        workbook = await workbook.xlsx.readFile(templatePath);
        await workbook.xlsx.writeFile("export.xlsx");

original file: [Planung-und-Statistik-Bsp.xlsx](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/files/6344344/Planung-und-Statistik-Bsp.xlsx)
maniupulated file: [export.xlsx](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/files/6344348/export.xlsx)

Before ExcelJS:
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/25907544/115414619-7b719480-a1f6-11eb-920b-5bbd327cbe29.png)
After ExcelJS:
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/25907544/115414587-73b1f000-a1f6-11eb-9014-02d130841676.png)


This are the worksheets when loaded, there also seems to be a mismatch between the length of 8 and the 6 worksheets that are actually there.

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/25907544/115415083-e4590c80-a1f6-11eb-9a3e-4b659758aca5.png)


## The expected behaviour:

Pivot tables still intact.
```

comments.author: fabrykowski
comments.body: This seems to be the same problem as #261
